Precision irrigation solutions for the Central Valley's unique climate. Serving Elk Grove, Roseville, and Folsom with tailored water management systems.

What We Do

Our Services

Drip Irrigation Systems

Sprinkler System Repair

Smart Irrigation Controllers
SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Rooted in Sacramento Soil

Founded in 2012, Horizon Irrigation began as a two-person operation serving Midtown bungalows with outdated sprinkler systems. Today, we design smart irrigation solutions for Sacramento's diverse neighborhoods.

We specialize in drought-resistant designs that account for clay soil expansion and 100°F summers. Our team understands how Sacramento's microclimates affect water distribution.

From historic Land Park homes to Natomas developments, we're committed to water conservation that preserves our region's beauty while adapting to its challenges.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Irrigation

Climate-Smart Design

Systems engineered for Sacramento's extreme heat and clay soil conditions

Neighborhood Specialists

12 years adapting solutions from Craftsman homes to modern subdivisions

Water Wisdom

Helping homeowners navigate California's complex water regulations since 2012

Local Response

Same-week service for urgent repairs before the next heat wave

Schedule Your Irrigation Evaluation

Get a free assessment of your system's efficiency before summer peaks

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-irr-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Horizon transformed our East Sacramento cottage garden with a precision drip system that handles the clay soil beautifully. They suggested adding extra emitters for our roses that always struggled in summer heat. Two seasons later, everything thrives while using half the water of our old sprinklers.

Meredith K. Drip Irrigation Installation
“

When a leak was flooding our Land Park driveway during 108°F temps, Horizon came within hours. They not only fixed the broken valve but reconfigured our zones to prevent future issues. Their knowledge of older neighborhood systems is unmatched.

James R. Emergency Sprinkler Repair
“

Our new smart controller automatically adjusts for Elk Grove's watering days and saved us $80 last month. The tech walked us through every app feature until we were comfortable. No more coming home to sprinklers running in the rain!

Lisa T. Smart Controller Installation
“

Building a new home in Natomas, we needed irrigation that could handle the heavy soil. Horizon designed zones with proper drainage and used commercial-grade parts. Two summers in with zero issues - even during that brutal heat wave last September.

Carlos M. Complete System Installation
“

As snowbirds, we rely on Horizon to winterize our Folsom home. They take photos of the blow-out process and store our controller inside. Came home this spring to a perfectly functioning system programmed for current restrictions.

Sarah P. Seasonal Tune-Up
“

Fixed our erratic sprinklers in Midtown that kept tripping the breaker. Turned out to be faulty wiring from the 1980s installation. They rerouted everything neatly and now all zones work perfectly. Appreciate their honest approach - no upselling.

David L. Sprinkler Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How does drip irrigation handle our clay soil?
We use pressure-compensating emitters and sand filters to prevent clogging from Sacramento's mineral-rich water and soil particles.
Can I automate my system?
Yes, we install smart controllers that adjust for Sacramento's weather patterns and mandatory watering days.
Do you service older systems?
We specialize in updating 1970s-90s systems common in Land Park and Curtis Park neighborhoods.
